title: Bleachers 2026 Tour Openers Include Wednesday, This is Lorelei, American Football, & More
author: Chris DeVille
summary:

Notably, the openers for that gig are the sludgy, Southern-fried indie rock heroes Wednesday, making their MSG debut. Turns out Wednesday is not the only ultra-cool opening act Jack Antonoff has lined up for his band's 2026 tour.

The post Bleachers 2026 Tour Openers Include Wednesday, This is Lorelei, American Football, & More appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
When Bleachers played Union Pool this week, our own Scott Lapatine spotted posters advertising the band's June 23 performance at Madison Square Garden. Notably, the openers for that gig are the sludgy, Southern-fried indie rock heroes Wednesday, making their MSG debut. Turns out Wednesday is not the only ultra-cool opening act Jack Antonoff has lined up for his band's 2026 tour.

Bleachers just announced their Bleachers Forever Tour, which will take them all across North America this summer and fall after the May release of new album everyone for ten minutes. Besides some shows with Wednesday, support for the tour includes This Is Lorelei, American Football, Hovvdy, the Linda Lindas, and Momo Boyd. Good job, Bleachers! There's also a five-night run at the Troubadour in LA in September, which presumably will feature some other special guests.

Antonoff shared this message:

hi! we have worked our asses off to eliminate bullshit and get bleachers forever tickets to you at face value. the best way we can do this is to have you sign up for the shows you want to go to, and instructions for our presale will follow. this gives us the ability to kill as many bots and bastards as possible. we will be selling no tickets at absurd prices, so if you see that, you are in the wrong place. as always, one dollar from every ticket sold will go to the ally coalition's work with lgbtq+ homeless youth shelters. the ally coalition will also be present at every show tabling with local organizations. much more exciting stuff about what will be happening at bleachers forever shows to come, but for now, we want to have an on sale with as much dignity as possible and do everything we can to make sure our people get tickets at the price that we set. love you all very much. you know how deep this is for me. the band and i cannot wait to be with you soon. xx jack

Official onsale for tickets is next Friday, March 20, but a fan pre-sale begins Wednesday, March 18. Get more info here and check out the dates below.
